scripts.test: npm run test:neon-heist:logic && npm run test:orbit-rescue:logic && npm run test:tide-courier:logic && npm run test:cavern-blast:logic && npm run test:magnet-forge:logic
scripts.test:neon-heist:logic: node -e "const mod=require('./src/js/neon-heist.js'); const result=mod.runSelfCheck(40); if (!result.ok) { console.error(JSON.stringify(result)); process.exit(1); } console.log(JSON.stringify(result));"
scripts.test:orbit-rescue:logic: node -e "const mod=require('./src/js/orbit-rescue.js'); const result=mod.runSelfCheck(6); if (!result.ok) { console.error(JSON.stringify(result)); process.exit(1); } console.log(JSON.stringify(result));"
scripts.test:tide-courier:logic: node -e "const mod=require('./src/js/tide-courier.js'); const result=mod.runSelfCheck(6); if (!result.ok) { console.error(JSON.stringify(result)); process.exit(1); } console.log(JSON.stringify(result));"
scripts.test:cavern-blast:logic: node -e "const mod=require('./src/js/cavern-blast.js'); const result=mod.runSelfCheck(6); if (!result.ok) { console.error(JSON.stringify(result)); process.exit(1); } console.log(JSON.stringify(result));"
